messages.content:
Translate

"プリキュアシリーズ毎の衣装の難易度としては、キラキラプリキュアアラモードは段違いだと思う
ほぼ造形だし、支え方が不明な動物の尻尾とかついてるし

プリアラは人数自体も多いし、スマイルや5と違って共通するパーツもないし、公式着ぐるみ製作班は大変だったろうなーと思ってる"

In terms of difficulty of costumes for each Pretty Cure series, I think KiraKira Pretty Cure A La Mode is on a different level. It's almost entirely formed, and there are things like animal tails with unclear supports.

With PriPara, there's also a larger number of characters, and unlike Smile or Yes! PreCure 5, there aren't any common parts, so I think the official costume-making team must have had a tough time.

Translate

"プリキュアシリーズの着ぐるみ版は自作でもみんな可愛い〜です♥(* ॑꒳ ॑* )"
The mascot version of the Pretty Cure series is cute even when it's homemade〜 ♥(* ॑꒳ ॑* )
"鷹嶺ルイさんが着ぐるみ化したじゃない〜⁉️"
"Isn't that Takamine Rui-san who turned into a mascot costume〜⁉️"

"嗯~ 小年夜啦~ 終於可以放下手邊工作小酌一下🥃
これからもよろしくお願いします🥰"

"Mm~ It's Chinese New Year's Eve~ Finally, I can put aside my work and have a little drink🥃
I look forward to your continued support🥰"
"救命！我被娃娃包围了！"
"Help! I'm surrounded by dolls!"

"『そらとものみんなー！元気ー？
ときのそらです！』

ホロライブ0期生
ときのそら"

"Soratomos (Sky Friends) everyoneー! Are you all doing well?
I'm <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>! ✨

Hololive 0th Generation
Tokino Sora"

"えとたま着させて貰ったお写真📷
楽しかった🥰"

"Here's a photo of me dressed up in an Etotama costume 📷
It was fun 🥰"
"Who?"

"2巻は…2巻はいつ出るの…？(血涙)"

"コレ欲しいな〜、着ぐるみさん漫画‼️( ´∀`)σ"

"When is volume 2 coming out...? (bloody tears)"

"I want this~ The mascot character manga‼️( ´∀`)σ"

"着ぐるみ はざま
三次元の 二次元と
･･･それは"

"Kigurumi Hazama
The two-dimensional in three-dimensions
...That is"

"カブルモン
KABURUMON
藤堂あきと
akito tondon"

"カブルモン (KABURUMON)
藤堂あきと (Akito Todou)"

"私高沢和葉は今"

"人生において 重要な分岐点に 立つています"

"I, Kazuha Takasawa, am now"

"standing at an important crossroads in life."
"写真を 撮られることに 夢中だったけど 肌タイツの汗すこい"
"I was obsessed with taking photos, but the sweat in the bodysuit is intense."

"着ぐるみにお着替え中。
※着ぐるみマスクが無くてごめんね😅"

"Changing into a mascot costume.
※ Sorry for not having the mascot mask on. 😅"
"こちらが全身の写真になります。お納め下さい。"
"Here is a full-body photo. Please accept it."
"明日は仕事だ。寝る。"
"Tomorrow is work. Time to sleep."

"プリキュアシリーズ

着ぐるみじょない方。
「美少女戦士セーラームーン」は実写化もされているのに、プリキュアは未だにない。 #じゃあキミら何の実写版なら見たいんだよグランプリ"

"Pretty Cure Series

The non-mascot side.
'Sailor Moon' has been made into a live-action version, but Pretty Cure still hasn't been. #SoWhatLiveActionVersionDoYouWantToSeeGrandPrix"
"過去にプリキュア着ぐるみ絡みの案件で一番有名なのが、プリキュアシリーズのキャラクターショーをYouTubeで無断公開してるキャラクターショー専門のアカウントがあって、それでそのアカウントが収益狙って稼いでるという報告を受けたっけ。"

"In the past, one of the most famous cases involving Pretty Cure mascots was when there was an account specializing in character shows that was publishing Pretty Cure series character shows on YouTube without permission. I remember hearing reports that this account was aiming for revenue and making money off of it."

"秋田でドリステのCMやってたぁぁぁ
まじで地方民みんなこのチャンスにドリステ観てくれ😭着ぐるみだからどうとか偏見はもはや捨て去ってくれ！最高にかっこいいプリキュアたちを観てほしいし、子どもたちも大人も満足感半端ないです！！おすすめー！！"

"They were doing DoriSute (Pretty Cure series Dream Stars) commercials in Akita ahhh
Seriously, everyone in the countryside, please take this chance to watch DoriSute 😭 Set aside any prejudice you might have about it being a mascot show! I want you to see the incredibly cool Pretty Cure girls, and it's highly satisfying for both kids and adults!! Highly recommendedー!!"
"プリキュア着ぐるみとコスプレお姉さん（公式）登場"
"Pretty Cure mascot costume and cosplaying sister (official) appear"
"朝のニュース見てたら、着ぐるみの事件が全国区のニュースになってて溜め息しか出ない。"
"I was watching the morning news, and there was a mascot-related incident that made national news, and all I could do was sigh."

"ひろがるスカイ！プリキュア／キュアバタフライ

2024年最初の一着は

アゲてひろがるワンダホー！キュアバタフライ

でした！🦋
スカートの横フリルと後ろの長い部分が凄く悩みましたが、何とか思った通りの形になりました。
重さも凄いことに…
造形ではないのでクリーニング可能です。

着ぐるみさん用衣装です。"

"Expanding Sky! Pretty Cure / Cure Butterfly

The first costume of 2024 was

Raising and expanding wonder, Cure Butterfly!

That was it! 🦋
I had a hard time with the side frills of the skirt and the long part at the back, but somehow it turned out exactly as I envisioned.
The weight is also quite something...
Since it's not molded, it can be cleaned.

This is a costume for a mascot."
"プリキュア"

"Pretty Cure" is the name of a popular franchise known for its magical girl anime series produced by Toei Animation. The series focuses on a group of girls who transform into legendary warriors, the Pretty Cures, to fight against evil forces and protect the world. Each series typically features a different group of Cures and themes, providing various narratives and characters throughout the franchise's history.
"full-head mask"

A "full-head mask" refers to a type of mask that covers the entire head, often including the face, back of the head, and sometimes even the neck. These masks are used for a variety of purposes, including:

1. Costume and cosplay: Full-head masks are popular in creating characters from movies, video games, and comic books for conventions and Halloween.

2. Performance art and theater: Actors may use full-head masks to transform into a character, often in theatrical productions or in street performance art.

3. Mascots: Sports teams and companies often have mascot characters with full-head masks to engage audiences and promote team spirit or brand recognition.

4. Protection: In some industries, such as hazardous material handling or certain construction jobs, full-head masks can serve as protective gear against environmental hazards.

Full-head masks can be made from various materials, including latex, silicone, foam, and plastic, depending on the intended use, required movement, and level of detail. They are particularly appreciated for their ability to offer a complete character transformation.

Translate to Japanese

"full-head mask"
"フルヘッドマスク"
